text: Oh, no! They’re eating all the jelly donuts and eclairs!
They’re drinking all the lemonade!
This is cruel and unusual.
Those aren’t Squirtles; they’re Piggles!
They’re starting on the sandwiches.
We’ve got to do something.
Oh, wait! You, Squirtles, how’d you like to do a little job for us?
There are these three kids with a Pikachu.
Our boss would be most appreciative if you helped us capture them.
He’d make it worth your while.
What did Squirtle answer?
The Squirtle said, "Forget it. We know humans can’t be trusted."
So, make them trust us!
Hmm, that won’t be easy, but I’ll see what I can do.
Squirtle, both of these humans belong to Meowth!
Belong to?
They’ll never trust you two; you’ve got "liar" written all over you. Just let me handle this.
Oh, you little...
These humans are my pets. I trained them, but they’re pretty stupid.
Don’t ever raise your voice to me again, you bad human!
Bad human! Bad, bad human!
See? You guys can trust me!
Meowth, what about us? Untie us, too!
- I want a donut!  - Be quiet.
We gotta keep up this act till the Squirtles trust me, and that’s going to a little time!
- I caught something!  - Huh?
- I’m soaked. - Me, too.
Knock it off, Pikachu!
Wet clothes conduct electricity!
I’ve had enough of your pranks, Squirtle!
Pikachu, it’s out of the water now!
Huh?
Oh! Pikachu!
Oh, it’s a Goldeen; watch out for its horn!
Swim to shore, Pikachu. Hurry up!
Faster! Faster!
They got us.
